data.body: Fix applied: inserted HARD-GATE block at plugins/dso/skills/sprint/SKILL.md Phase 8 (line 1895), immediately before the epic closure sequence. Gate requires: dso:completion-verifier dispatched at Phase 6 Step 0.75 with EPIC ID (not story ID), returning overall_verdict: PASS THIS session. Explicitly distinguishes story-level verifier (Step 10a) from epic-level verifier (Step 0.75). Bot-psychologist diagnosis: Failure Mode 7 (Multi-Step Reasoning Drift) + Mode 11 (Positional Bias). Diff: 4 lines inserted.
